__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Magellan's Telescope,Origin of Species,Prometheus Torch,Unispark,Relativity Scripts
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Power: 600,000/600,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Power]]
